complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires direct retrieval of specific assessment knowledge—identifying which standardized instrument appropriately measures a particular cognitive domain without applying information to a hypothetical scenario.

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires direct knowledge of what cognitive ability digit span measures without scenario interpretation—a straightforward definition retrieval about assessment subtest purpose.

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires retrieval of definitional knowledge about what RAN measures—rapid automatized naming and retrieval fluency—without application to a clinical scenario.

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires direct factual knowledge of TOMAL-2 subdomains without interpreting a clinical case or scenario—simple retrieval of assessment construct information.

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because it requires applying knowledge of SLD evaluation requirements to determine which processing assessment is essential for suspected reading disability assessment.

complexity_rationale: This is a Recall item because it requires direct knowledge of NEPSY-II characteristics and what domains it assesses—simple retrieval without application to a clinical scenario.

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because it requires interpreting a specific cognitive profile and determining which processing measure would best clarify the underlying deficit causing fluency problems.

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because it requires applying knowledge of assessment design to create a testing approach that distinctly measures and compares two overlapping but separate constructs.

complexity_rationale: This is an Application item because it requires understanding evaluation best practices and determining when and how processing measures should be incorporated into comprehensive assessment protocols.

complexity_rationale: This is an Analysis item because it requires synthesizing information about measurement relationships and interpreting what discrepancies mean relative to task differences and underlying cognitive variation.
